title: neocheiropteris pappei
intro: Neocheiropteris pappei is a species of fern, specifically a type of tree fern, that belongs to the family Davalliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris pappei are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual factors.
